sql:
SELECT  SYSLOG.ALARMNO
                , SYSLOG.NODE_NM
                , SYSLOG.NODE_NUM
                , SYSLOG.ALARMLOC
                , TO_CHAR(SYSLOG.ALARMTIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ALARMTIME
                , SYSLOG.ALARMMSG
                , SYSLOG.ETC
                , SOP.PROC_STATUS
                , SOP.FAULT_CLASSIFY
                , SOP.FAULT_TYPE
                , SOP.FAULT_DETAIL_CONTENT
                , SOP.ETC_CONTENT
                , TO_CHAR(SOP.ALARM_OCCUR_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ALARM_OCCUR_TIME
                , TO_CHAR(SOP.HANDLING_FIN_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS HANDLING_FIN_TIME
                , SOP.HANDLING_FIN_USER
                , SOP.STATUS
        FROM    nia.tb_syslog_sop SOP
        INNER JOIN rca.tb_syslog_alarm_mst SYSLOG ON SOP.ALARMNO = SYSLOG.ALARMNO
         WHERE (  SOP.HANDLING_FIN_TIME  >  NOW() - INTERVAL '1' MONTH ) 
        ORDER BY SYSLOG.ALARMTIME DESC
            LIMIT 100 OFFSET 0
